title: Seeff celebrates annual awards
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Seeff recently celebrated its talented estate agents at the Seeff Regional Annual Awards for 2023.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Seeff recently celebrated its talented estate agents at the Seeff Regional Annual Awards for 2023."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"What a morning of splendour and recognition it was at the Seeff Regional Annual Awards held last week set against the backdrop of the Hawthorn Boutique Hotel in George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The morning exuded warmth and sophistication with its soft lighting and cosy ambiance. Amidst this inviting atmosphere, our talented estate agents took centre stage to be celebrated for their outstanding contributions to our legacy of success.","html":"The morning exuded warmth and sophistication with its soft lighting and cosy ambiance. Amidst this inviting atmosphere, our talented estate agents took centre stage to be celebrated for their outstanding contributions to our legacy of success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The air was filled with anticipation and excitement as each agent was acknowledged for their unwavering dedication, stellar performance, and commitment to excellence in the real estate industry.","html":"The air was filled with anticipation and excitement as each agent was acknowledged for their unwavering dedication, stellar performance, and commitment to excellence in the real estate industry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Applause reverberated through the venue, echoing the heartfelt appreciation for their remarkable achievements.","html":"Applause reverberated through the venue, echoing the heartfelt appreciation for their remarkable achievements."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We congratulate Pam Smit and Natasha Jafta for the Long Service Award, awarded for being a part of Seeff for 10 years.","html":"We congratulate Pam Smit and Natasha Jafta for the Long Service Award, awarded for being a part of Seeff for 10 years."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Natasha Jafta was awarded the Administrator of the Year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Talia Day Halderman achieved 9th place in Rand value and Unit value. Penny Rice achieved 4th place in Rand value and Unit value. Norma Soule and Tracy Boomer achieved first place in Partnership of two in both Unit and Rand value.","html":"Talia Day Halderman achieved 9th place in Rand value and Unit value. Penny Rice achieved 4th place in Rand value and Unit value. Norma Soule and Tracy Boomer achieved first place in Partnership of two in both Unit and Rand value."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tracy Boomer and Norma Soule also were awarded the Long Service award, for being at Seeff for 10 years","html":"Tracy Boomer and Norma Soule also were awarded the Long Service award, for being at Seeff for 10 years"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Norma Sole, Samuel Seeff and Tracy Boomer","html":"Norma Sole, Samuel Seeff and Tracy Boomer"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Beyond being a celebration of the past, the event served as a powerful testament to our enduring commitment to excellence.","html":"Beyond being a celebration of the past, the event served as a powerful testament to our enduring commitment to excellence."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"As we reflect on 60 years of remarkable achievements, we look forward to embarking on new milestones and forging even greater successes in the future."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Here's to our exceptional estate agents, whose passion and professionalism continue to elevate our company to new heights,\" says Seeff.","html":"Here's to our exceptional estate agents, whose passion and professionalism continue to elevate our company to new heights,\" says Seeff."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Samuel Seeff and Pam Smit","html":"Samuel Seeff and Pam Smit"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Samuel Seeff and Talia Halderman","html":"Samuel Seeff and Talia Halderman"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
